data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of pausing a subscription, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality is implemented. The linked use case mentions the ability to pause the subscription for two months while reserving the same time slot, but the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this capability. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the expected result of confirming the requirement is not met.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks validating the ability to pause the subscription while keeping the slot reserved.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API validation for pausing subscription
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the subscription can be paused while keeping the slot reserved.
